$schema: Cross-language test fixtures for the V162 budget guard formula.
description: Single source of truth used by both BudgetGuardParityTest (Java JUnit) and budgetGuards.parity.test.mjs (JS Jest). When the formula changes, update this file - both runners will then enforce the new behavior. Pattern mirrors agent-stop-reason.json.
formula: projectedNext = max(growthProj, lastDeltaProj × LAST_DELTA_SAFETY_FACTOR, worstCaseSingleIter); deny iff (runCostSoFar + projectedNext > balance) OR (runCostSoFar >= balance)

cases.name: regression_minus11305_step_function_burst
cases.description: The actual bug: 31 cruise iters at ~70k prompt tokens each, balance ~2308 left. WorstCase for V162-seeded claude-code/claude-opus-4-6 (200K ctx + 64K out at 15/75 USD per 1M) = 200×15 + 64×75 = 3000 + 4800 = 7800 credits. consumed + worstCase >> balance → DENY before iter 32 burst lands.

cases.name: first_iteration_no_history_proceeds
cases.description: On iter 1, lastDelta is 0 and avg over 0 iters is 0. Without worstCase, projection is 0 and the guard must allow the first call (otherwise no run can ever start).

cases.name: balance_exhausted_proceeds_false_immediately
cases.description: consumed >= balance must short-circuit even before projection kicks in.

cases.name: step_function_burst_caught_by_lastDelta_safety_factor
cases.description: Cruise at ~5k/iter for 5 iters, then iter 5 spikes to +50k delta. lastDelta×2 = 100k tokens × 0.005 ≈ 500 credits. Balance 600 left → projected next > balance → DENY without needing worstCase.

cases.name: comfortable_balance_with_known_worstCase_proceeds
cases.description: Balance >> worstCase so the run can proceed normally. Sonnet 200K ctx + 8K out at 3/15 ≈ 720 credits worstCase; balance 5000 → headroom.

cases.name: gemini_2m_below_window_proceeds
cases.description: Gemini 2.0 Pro 2M context. PromptTokens 1.8M is under 95% of window - guard must NOT deny based on a hard 2M global cap (the v1 mistake). worstCase ≈ 2M × 1.25/1M + 65K × 5/1M = 2500 + 325 = 2825 credits; balance 10000 → proceed.

cases.name: missing_ctx_window_legacy_falls_back_to_growth_only
cases.description: Pre-V162 row has null contextWindow / maxOutputTokens. Without the requireCtxWindow flag, guard must fall back to growth-only projection (legacy behavior - don't break existing snapshots). With balance 1000 and small growth proj, proceed.

cases.name: missing_ctx_window_with_flag_fails_closed
cases.description: Same legacy row, but requireCtxWindow=true (Phase 1C flag-on). Guard must DENY rather than silently let an unbounded model through. P1.3 fix.

cases.name: low_balance_high_worstCase_denies_early
cases.description: Balance 500, but Opus worstCase = 200K × 15/1k + 64K × 75/1k = 7800 credits. Even with tiny actual usage so far, projection trips the guard immediately. This is the key invariant that closes -11305.

cases.name: exact_equal_consumed_balance_denies
cases.description: Edge: consumed exactly equals balance. The guard uses >= for the exhaust check so this denies (any further iter would over-spend by definition).

cases.name: lastDelta_dominant_with_no_worstCase_ceiling
cases.description: Model has null contextWindow → no worstCase ceiling. growth proj is small (avg over 6 iters of mostly-cheap calls), but lastDelta×2 catches the recent burst. Proves the lastDelta branch is non-redundant when worstCase is unavailable. Cumulative 200k @ 5/15 = ~1003 credits used. avg ≈ 33k×5+0.6k×15 = ~174 credits. lastDelta = 80k×5+0.5k×15 = ~407 → ×2 = ~815. Balance 1500 → consumed (~1003) + 815 = 1818 > 1500 → DENY via lastDelta.

cases.name: growth_dominant_when_lastDelta_is_zero
cases.description: lastDelta is zero (a free-cache hit on the previous iter), but cumulative growth+upcoming-avg projection trips the guard. Proves growth branch is non-redundant. cumulative=400k×5+5k×15 = 2075 credits. avg = 80k×5+1k×15 = 415 credits. lastDelta=0×2=0. worstCase=null. consumed (2075) + growth (415) = 2490 > 2400 balance → DENY via growth.

cases.name: byok_zero_rates_proceeds_when_under_balance
cases.description: BYOK case: rates are 0 (provider key, platform doesn't bill). consumed = 0, projection = 0 even with worstCase since worstCase is also 0. Guard proceeds - the platform doesn't bill BYOK calls, but the bridge guard also shouldn't block them.
